They used an underwater camera that took pictures every seventy seconds. Some of the pictures seemed to show a red-brown creature with a four-meter-long body and a four-meter neck with a very ugly head. Many people then began to believe in the monster. However, even today, we can't be certain. So the key points here are that the American scientists used a camera taking pictures every 70 seconds, and some of those pictures showed a creature that looked like a monster. The answer should be D: took some pictures which seemed to show a monster. Let me check the other options to be sure. Option A: found the monster itself.
